title: Relationship-Aware Safety Unlearning for Multimodal LLMs
summary: arXiv:2603.14185v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Generative multimodal models can exhibit safety failures that are inherently relational: two benign concepts can become unsafe when linked by a specific action or relation (e.g., child-drinking-wine).
